title: The Big Festive Sale
scenario: The year's biggest online shopping festival is live. Your cart has slowly filled with ₹22,000 of 'great deals': headphones, clothes, a smartwatch and kitchen gadgets, most of which you had not planned to buy. EMI options make it all feel painless.

choices.label: Buy only the one item you had genuinely planned for and clear the rest of the cart
choices.lesson: A shopping list is your defence against sales. Decide what you need before the sale, not while staring at the discounts.

choices.label: Check out the whole cart on a no-cost EMI
choices.lesson: 'No-cost EMI' still commits future income and often hides fees. Splitting a payment does not make an unplanned purchase a good idea.
